preferences: 融合 skill 时需要在 frontmatter 中添加 secondary_sources 字段
融合后的 skill 应在 description 中说明融合了哪些功能
fixes: fusion skill 需要同时更新主源和次源的 hash
融合内容应添加到 SKILL.md 正文中，包含关键规则速查和工作流说明

source.derived_from: Claude Artifacts design system prompt (reverse-engineered via .zread project)
source.note: Local-only provenance; not redistributable. Not suitable for secondary_sources (no public URL, no stable hash contract).

absorbed: 6-step HTML artifact workflow (Understand → Explore → Plan → Build → Verify → Summarize)
questions_v2 checklist (5 mandatory dimensions + 10 questions template)
anti-slop tactical rules (5 core + avoid list)
design tokens with oklch color strategy (scoped as artifact fallback)
react+babel inline JSX guide with integrity hashes
8 starter components (deck_stage, design_canvas, animations, 4 device frames)
explicit triggers[] list for HTML artifact keywords
scope_adjustments: design-tokens.md font defaults demoted to artifact fallback (reference/typography.md stays PRIMARY)
questions_v2 reduced to missing-facts-only when DESIGN.md present (Precedence Rule added)
fusions.rationale: Single entry point for all design work; eliminate duplicate anti-slop & token rules; preserve theoretical DESIGN.md system and Apache 2.0 upstream compatibility
